strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building event-driven systems and contributing to agentic AI infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong full-stack engineering background with proven ability to ship production systems across diverse domains (GIS, fintech-adjacent pricing, real-time data)
Active open-source contributor with technical depth in low-latency systems (DLang), observability tooling, and developer productivity frameworks
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lack of clear demonstration of AI systems in regulated fintech environments (credit risk, working capital, compliance infrastructure)
Resume uses inconsistent name (James Smith vs. Bogdan Szabo) and lacks executive-level impact metrics or board-level communication experience
response.justification: The candidate brings strong technical depth in event-driven systems and emerging agentic AI tooling, with relevant production experience in real-time data and distributed systems, but lacks demonstrable leadership at executive scale and direct experience in regulated fintech domains critical to the role.
